hero.titleLine1: A refined space for cultural belonging,
hero.description: We connect Chinese families, youth, and local partners through elegant programs, accessible support, and meaningful cultural exchange across Queensland.

quickLinks.title: Three pathways into the community
quickLinks.description: Minimal, welcoming, and easy to navigate—designed for members, volunteers, and new visitors alike.

items.title: Events
items.description: Seasonal programs, cultural gatherings, and workshops that bring people together with warmth and clarity.

items.description: Stories, updates, and reflective moments from our latest community initiatives and partnerships.

items.title: Membership
items.description: Join a growing network of supporters, families, and volunteers who care deeply about belonging.

featuredEvents.title: Upcoming experiences
featuredEvents.description: A calm, premium overview of what is next.

items.title: Mid-Autumn Community Evening
items.description: An intergenerational evening of performances, stories, and tea designed to welcome both long-time members and first-time visitors.

items.description: A guided session for students and young professionals focused on confidence, identity, and local opportunities in Queensland.

latestNews.title: Latest notes from our community

items.title: A quieter, more caring model for community support
items.excerpt: We introduced a more human-centered structure for member onboarding, making our first contact warmer and easier to understand.

items.title: Listening sessions with bilingual student leaders
items.excerpt: Our latest youth roundtable focused on belonging, confidence, and how culture can be expressed lightly in modern community spaces.

items.title: New collaborations across education and wellbeing
items.excerpt: We are deepening our local network to create smoother pathways for support, volunteerism, and family engagement.

intro.title: Built with care, clarity, and cultural warmth
intro.description: A modern non-profit presence with a premium sense of calm.
intro.splitTitle: Rooted in Chinese heritage, open to the wider Queensland community.
intro.body1: We create elegant, accessible spaces where culture is shared with subtlety and confidence. Our programs are designed to support families, students, elders, and volunteers with thoughtful community care.
intro.body2: Rather than overwhelming people with noise, we focus on clarity, trust, and refined experiences that feel welcoming both online and in person.

gallery.title: Moments of gathering and care
gallery.description: A masonry showcase inspired by editorial layouts and soft cultural storytelling.

timeline.title: Our journey
timeline.description: A concise history of growth and community impact.

items.title: Community foundation
items.description: The organization began as a volunteer-led initiative supporting new Chinese families settling in Queensland.

items.title: Cultural education expansion
items.description: Programs for youth and families expanded to include heritage workshops, language support, and inclusive public events.

items.title: Digital outreach transformation
items.description: We introduced more accessible digital communication and a stronger bilingual presence for broader engagement.

items.title: Refined community platform
items.description: A premium online identity now supports a calmer, more modern experience for members, partners, and volunteers.

team.title: A thoughtful team behind the mission
team.description: Small, capable, and deeply connected to the people we serve.

events.title: Programs shaped for connection
events.description: Every event is designed with a soft premium feel: clear, inclusive, and memorable.

items.title: Mid-Autumn Community Evening
items.description: Music, stories, tea, and family-friendly cultural sharing in a welcoming evening atmosphere.

items.title: Youth Mentorship Circle
items.description: A bilingual session exploring study, career direction, and belonging for young people in Queensland.

items.title: Volunteer Welcome Atelier
items.description: An elegant orientation event introducing our values, partner pathways, and practical ways to get involved.

news.title: Stories, updates, and reflections
news.description: Filter by theme to explore the latest progress across programs and partnerships.

items.title: A quieter, more caring model for community support

items.excerpt: Our latest youth roundtable focused on belonging, confidence, and how culture can be expressed lightly in modern community spaces.

items.title: New collaborations across education and wellbeing
items.excerpt: We are deepening our local network to create smoother pathways for support, volunteerism, and family engagement.

items.title: Refining community access through bilingual design
items.excerpt: Our service touchpoints now prioritize simplicity, visual calm, and easier first-time navigation for new members.

items.title: Mentorship pilots expand into semester planning
items.excerpt: Student-focused mentoring is now being tested as a repeatable seasonal format with stronger local partner support.

items.title: Shared initiatives with local cultural institutions
items.excerpt: Joint planning has begun for a more open calendar of community events that feel both refined and accessible.

footer.description: A refined digital home for a Chinese non-profit organization in Queensland—built to feel elegant, trustworthy, and human.
